recent_calls.summary: Anthony called after hours to follow up on an existing quote and requested customer service to review or clarify the wording in the quote. The agent documented the request but was unable to connect him to a live agent due to after-hours. The call ended with the user hanging up.

Arnie from American Home Shield called to inquire about the status of a furnace replacement for work order 32433869. The agent informed him that the team would review the work order and follow up with an update at any time convenient for Arnie. The call ended with Arnie expressing thanks and agreeing to wait for the response.
The call was very brief with only the agent greeting the user and no further interaction before the user hung up.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing themselves and no further interaction from the user before the call ended.

The user called after-hours seeking to speak with a live service representative about a heating or cooling system issue that needs urgent attention. The agent could not connect the user to a live person but documented the request and updated the user's service address and contact information for follow-up on the next business day. The user expressed frustration but provided necessary details for the service team to act upon.

The user called to inquire about the pricing for heating and cooling system tune-ups. The agent provided the standard service fee and offered to have the team follow up, but the user declined further contact. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further action requested.
The user requested to speak to a live agent immediately, and the initial agent transferred the call to another agent successfully. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a call transfer.
The user, Derek from American Home Shield, requested to be connected to a Metro Life agent. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate agent.

Derek from American Home called to follow up on a dispatch and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, handled the call professionally and completed the transfer successfully.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate representative. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The agent attempted to start the call by asking for the user's service address ZIP code, but the user did not respond and hung up shortly after. The call lasted only 19 seconds and ended abruptly.

Ellen from American Home Shield called to confirm a dispatch related to a cooling service and to verify if the issue needed to be transferred to an electrician. The agent confirmed the dispatch number and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The agent greeted the user and attempted to assist, but the user requested to speak with an operator. The agent then transferred the call to a live agent as requested.

The user, Deborah Salmon, called to discuss a service agreement for her furnace heating system and requested to speak with an agent immediately. The agent confirmed the details and informed her that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her shortly. Deborah declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The agent attempted to engage the user by asking for their service address ZIP code, but the user did not respond and hung up shortly after. No further information was exchanged during the call.
The user called after missing a phone call and requested to speak with a representative. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Kasia from American Home Shield called to inquire about the status of a dispatch for a customer, specifically regarding payment authorization and service scheduling for an air conditioning repair. The agent acknowledged the issue and assured Kasia that the team would review the payment status and provide an update on the repair timing, with follow-up to Kasia or the customer. The call ended with confirmation of the details and no further questions from Kasia.

The user called to schedule an installation appointment for a boiler part that had arrived, related to a home warranty service. The agent gathered some details but the user requested to be connected to another agent for further assistance. The call was then transferred successfully.
The call was very brief and ended abruptly after the agent's initial greeting and request for the user's ZIP code. The user hung up without responding or engaging further.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and no further conversation before the user hung up.
The user called to speak with a representative about someone coming to their home today. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call.

The user called to confirm the timing of their appointment. The agent verified the appointment details and clarified that the technician Patrick is scheduled between 12:30 and 1:30 PM, not between 12 and 1 PM as the user initially thought. The user did not request any changes or additional help.

The user, Irene from American Home Shield, contacted Budget to report an electrical issue related to an air conditioning installation by Budget AC. The issue involves power disconnection and tripping despite technician assessments that the problem is with the AC unit. The agent collected detailed information, confirmed the service request, and assured follow-up by the Budget team.

The user called to schedule an appointment for a cooling system tune-up and identified themselves as the owner. The agent gathered basic information and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.
The user, Debra, returned a phone call and was promptly transferred by the agent Sophie to a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.
The agent attempted to connect the user, Fatmata, with a live representative for further assistance and successfully transferred the call to another agent.

Lauren called to reschedule a routine maintenance appointment. The agent confirmed details and booked an appointment for Friday, May 1st at 12 PM. The call ended after the booking was successfully made and the user confirmed the details.
The user called and requested to speak with CG. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate live agent.

The user, Tamara, called to provide a dispatch number and requested assistance with a home warranty service. After providing the dispatch number and service type, she asked to speak with a live representative, and the agent transferred the call accordingly.
The user called Budget and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and completed a successful call transfer.

The user called to inquire about the service technician's appointment. The agent confirmed the appointment for technician Devon scheduled for April 22nd between 8 AM and 9 AM. The user had no further questions and ended the call.

The user, Richard Reimer, called to request installation of a new standard 40-gallon gas water heater at his home in Saint Peters, Missouri. The agent provided available installation slots in April and May, and the user expressed preference for a Wednesday afternoon in May but did not finalize a specific time before ending the call. The call ended without a confirmed booking or further contact details.

Rob called to follow up on a thermostat issue where a button remained broken despite a previous technician visit. He provided his contact details and service address, expressed that he is waiting for home warranty approval, and scheduled a service for anytime next week. The call ended positively with Rob giving a high satisfaction rating and no out-of-pocket costs were confirmed pending warranty review.
The user requested to be connected with a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another representative.
The user called and requested to speak with Nicole. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.

The user called to speak with a manager about an installation opportunity and provided their name, role as owner, and service address. The agent attempted to gather an email but the user declined to provide it. The call was then transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Rain, called to inquire about the status of a previous heating (furnace) work order and whether any repair had been completed. They also asked about the cash out or cash in lieu of option for the customer. The agent confirmed the details and assured that the request would be passed to the team for follow-up within the day.
The user called and requested to speak with CJ. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.

The user called back after receiving a missed call from Budget. The agent acknowledged the call and transferred the user to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer.
The call was an inbound call where the agent attempted to gather the user's service address ZIP code but reached voicemail. The user left a brief message apologizing for missing the call.

The user called to check the status of their service request and requested to be transferred to a live representative. The agent successfully transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak to Nicole, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate live agent successfully. The call ended shortly after the transfer was completed.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call successfully to another agent. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to inquire about a technician who was supposed to be first on the list but had not contacted her. The agent apologized for the delay and transferred the call to someone who could provide live updates. The call was successfully transferred without further issues.
The user called to check if they were scheduled and wanted to speak with a live agent. The AI assistant identified itself as not a real person and transferred the call to a live agent as requested.

The user called to confirm the time of their appointment scheduled for today with technician Devon between 1 and 2 PM. The agent successfully verified the user's identity and provided the appointment details. The user had no further questions or requests.

Nathan Perotti called to leave a message for Daniel regarding business insurance and workers' comp premiums for HVAC companies. He provided his email for follow-up and clarified the spelling multiple times. The agent confirmed the message and contact details before ending the call.

The user called to inquire about the time of their air conditioner service appointment. The agent explained that appointment times are not accessible before business hours but offered to prioritize the request and have the team contact the user once available. The user provided the service type but the call ended before further details or follow-up were arranged.
The call was very brief and ended immediately after the agent's initial greeting and request for the service address ZIP code. The user hung up without responding or engaging further.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself and asking how she could help, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
